<!-- The motivation / what problem this solves. -->

Related issue: Closes #

## How

<!-- Brief description of the approach. Mention the files/modules touched. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] feat: new feature
- [ ] fix: bug fix
- [ ] chore: tooling/deps/refactor
- [ ] docs: documentation
- [ ] breaking: breaking change

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch is named per convention (`feature/`, `bugfix/`, `hotfix/`, `chore/`, `docs/`)
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, ...)
- [ ] Tests added/updated for new behavior
- [ ] Tested locally (backend `./mvnw test` and/or frontend `npm test -- --no-watch`)
- [ ] CI is passing
- [ ] No secrets or `.env` files committed
- [ ] `main` is up to date before merging (no conflicts)

## Notes for reviewer

<!-- Anything they should pay attention to, context, how to test. -->
